# Fueled by Meesch

> Independent nutrition coaching practice led by Michelle, a Registered Dietitian
> (RD) with 5+ years of experience. Offers personalized, virtual coaching for
> weight management, sports and performance nutrition, gut health, and general
> wellness/habit-building.

## Key facts
- Founder: Michelle, Registered Dietitian (RD)
- Format: Virtual/online coaching
- Focus areas: Weight management, sports & performance nutrition, gut &
  digestive health, general wellness and habit-building
- Contact: michelle@fueledbymeesch.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Lagreedietetics

## Pages
- Home: https://www.fueledbymeesch.com/ — overview, coaching areas, how
  coaching works, FAQ, and contact.
